body_txt: The sexual abuse of children is one of the most reprehensible acts that a person can ever commit . Most people, even some criminals , take an extremely dim view towards the perpetrators of such acts, especially if they are parents. However, some parents are so reprehensible that they will actually try to profit from prostituting their own children for personal gain. Money is a typical motivation for this type of behavior; some parents are greedy and pimp out their children for extra spending money or luxuries. If the parent owes some kind of debt, then some parents might be willing to pimp out their child to either earn the money to pay it back or have the debt cleared by letting the creditor sleep with their child. A parent who wants their children to become a star might do so by forcing their child to sleep with people to earn roles . A Junkie Parent or Alcoholic Parent may pimp their kid to fund the addiction. Some parents may pimp out their child as an easy way to get them (and other children they may have) out of poverty. While some parents actively pimp out their own children, some parents are willing to tolerate a known pedophile harming their children if they feel that can benefit from it or that going against the molester will be inconvenient for them. If the molester is someone extremely powerful, a cowardly parent might let their child be molested to protect themselves or gain favor with the molester. A neglectful parent might insist on allowing their children to be molested because they are too apathetic or lazy to protect their children. A parent who is dating or married to a pedophile might allow said pedophile to molest their children to avoid being pestered for sex. The identity of the molester might also be a factor in a parent's toleration of molestation. If the pedophile is a teacher, then an Education Mama might either feel that their children's grades are more important than their mental health or see it as an opportunity to get higher grades . Likewise, a Sports Dad may turn a blind eye to a Creepy Gym Coach who they hope can advance the kid's athletic career. If a parent's boss is a pedophile, they might allow their boss to sleep with their child in order to get a promotion and/or a raise. If a parent's lover is a pedophile, a parent might have used their children to convince their partner to get together or keep their partner in their life. Whatever these people are easily considered (and most often naturally presented) as the lowest of the low. Sub-Trope of Abusive Parents . See also Parental Incest and Lecherous Stepparent for examples of parents molesting their own children and Useless Bystander Parent for cases of parents not caring that their kids are being molested. Contrast Wife Husbandry , when a person assumes a paternal role with a view of having sex with (and usually abusing) a child in their care. Further contrasted with Single Mom Stripper , where even those unhealthily blase about not hiding what they are doing from their kids consider selling their body for the sake of the household to be their job. Unfortunately, this is Truth in Television in some areas, usually where poverty is rampant.
